cerial.format.fieldGroupBlankLines.markdownDescription:
Blank line handling between fields inside blocks.

- **`single`** (default) — Preserve one blank line where the source had any:
  ```
  id    Record @id
  
  email Email  @unique
  name  String
  ```
- **`collapse`** — Remove all blank lines between fields:
  ```
  id    Record @id
  email Email  @unique
  name  String
  ```
- **`honor`** — Preserve the exact number of blank lines from the source (2, 3, etc.)

cerial.format.inlineConstructStyle.markdownDescription:
Style for inline constructs (enums, literals, tuples).

- **`multi`** — Always expand to multiple lines:
  ```
  enum Role {
    Admin,
    Editor,
    Viewer
  }
  ```
- **`single`** — Collapse to one line when possible:
  ```
  enum Role { Admin, Editor, Viewer }
  ```
- **`honor`** — Preserve existing style from source

cerial.format.decoratorAlignment.markdownDescription:
Decorator alignment style.

- **`aligned`** — Column-align decorators across fields:
  ```
  id        Record @id
  email     Email  @unique
  createdAt Date   @createdAt
  ```
- **`compact`** — No extra alignment spacing:
  ```
  id Record @id
  email Email @unique
  createdAt Date @createdAt
  ```

cerial.format.trailingComma.markdownDescription:
Add trailing commas in multi-line constructs.

- **`true`**:
  ```
  enum Role {
    Admin,
    Editor,
    Viewer,
  }
  ```
- **`false`**:
  ```
  enum Role {
    Admin,
    Editor,
    Viewer
  }
  ```

cerial.format.blankLineBeforeDirectives.markdownDescription:
Blank line before composite directives (`@@index`, `@@unique`).

- **`always`** — Always insert a blank line before directives:
  ```
  model User {
    id   Record @id
    name String
  
    @@unique(nameIdx, [name])
  }
  ```
- **`honor`** — Preserve existing formatting from source

cerial.diagnostics.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable or disable all diagnostics (parse errors and schema validation).

cerial.inlayHints.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable or disable all inlay hints.

cerial.inlayHints.inferredTypes.markdownDescription: Show inferred FK type hints on Record fields (e.g., `: CerialId<number>`).

cerial.inlayHints.behaviorHints.markdownDescription: Show behavioral hints for fields with automatic behavior (`auto-generated`, `computed`, `sets on create`, `resets on update`).

cerial.inlayHints.inheritedFields.markdownDescription: Show `from ParentName` hints on inherited fields.

cerial.trace.server.markdownDescription: Trace the communication between VS Code and the Cerial language server.

scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:grammar
scripts.test:integration:basic: bun run build && bun run compile:tests && vscode-test --label integrationTests
scripts.test:integration:convention: bun run build && bun run compile:tests && vscode-test --label integrationConvention
scripts.test:integration:root-config: bun run build && bun run compile:tests && vscode-test --label integrationRootConfig
scripts.test:integration:folder-config: bun run build && bun run compile:tests && vscode-test --label integrationFolderConfig
scripts.test:integration:root-folder-override: bun run build && bun run compile:tests && vscode-test --label integrationRootFolderOverride
scripts.test:integration:cerialignore: bun run build && bun run compile:tests && vscode-test --label integrationCerialignore
scripts.test:integration:path-filtering: bun run build && bun run compile:tests && vscode-test --label integrationPathFiltering
scripts.test:integration:mixed: bun run build && bun run compile:tests && vscode-test --label integrationMixed
scripts.test:integration:full: bun run build && bun run compile:tests && vscode-test --label integrationTests && vscode-test --label integrationConvention && vscode-test --label integrationRootConfig && vscode-test --label integrationFolderConfig && vscode-test --label integrationRootFolderOverride && vscode-test --label integrationCerialignore && vscode-test --label integrationPathFiltering && vscode-test --label integrationMixed
scripts.test:e2e:basic: bun run build && bun run compile:tests && vscode-test --label e2eTests
scripts.test:e2e:workflows: bun run build && bun run compile:tests && vscode-test --label e2eWorkflows
scripts.test:e2e:full: bun run build && bun run compile:tests && vscode-test --label e2eTests && vscode-test --label e2eWorkflows
scripts.test:full: bun run test && bun run test:integration:full && bun run test:e2e:full
scripts.dev:cursor: bun run package:latest && cursor --install-extension cerial-latest.vsix && echo 'Installed! Reload Window: Cmd+Shift+P > Reload Window'
